issues.sample: On April 8, 2026, while riding on a busy 8 Lane (4 each direction) interstate during evening rush hour, I experienced immediate loss of propulsion when I attempted to engage the throttle. There was absolutely no power, just a grinding noise. I immediately put on my hazard lights

narrative.headline: What 2023 Can-Am Spyder F3 owners report most
narrative.summary: Across 3 owner complaints to NHTSA, the most reported area is Fuel/Propulsion System (33% of reports).
